case_title: ZHAO, KIMBERLY VS TRAINOR, COLLEEN MICHELLE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,245.00 FILED BY ZHAO, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT TRAINOR, COLLEEN MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRAINOR, COLLEEN MICHELLE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-04-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-15-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 UNTIMELY SERVED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHAO, KIMBERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAINOR, COLLEEN MICHELLE $2,245.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,295.00, JOYCE MIN (FRIEND OF PLAINTIFF) SERVED AS INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
